# browsegrab — Full API Reference
> Token-efficient browser agent for local LLMs — Playwright + AX tree + MarkGrab, MCP native.
Install: `pip install browsegrab[all]` (extras: cli, mcp, content) then `playwright install chromium`
Requires: Python >=3.11, playwright >=1.49, httpx >=0.28
## Configuration
All configs load from env via `from_env()`. Prefix: `BROWSEGRAB_`.
### BrowseGrabConfig
Top-level aggregate. Fields: `browser: BrowserConfig`, `llm: LLMConfig`, `snapshot: SnapshotConfig`, `agent: AgentConfig`.
### BrowserConfig
| Param | Type | Default | Env var suffix |
|-------|------|---------|---------------|
| headless | bool | True | BROWSER_HEADLESS |
| timeout_ms | int | 30000 | BROWSER_TIMEOUT_MS |
| viewport_width | int | 1280 | BROWSER_VIEWPORT_WIDTH |
| viewport_height | int | 720 | BROWSER_VIEWPORT_HEIGHT |
| user_agent | str\|None | None | BROWSER_USER_AGENT |
| locale | str | "en-US" | BROWSER_LOCALE |
| ignore_https_errors | bool | False | BROWSER_IGNORE_HTTPS_ERRORS |
### LLMConfig
| Param | Type | Default | Env var suffix |
|-------|------|---------|---------------|
| provider | "vllm"\|"ollama"\|"openai" | "vllm" | LLM_PROVIDER |
| base_url | str | http://localhost:8000/v1 | LLM_BASE_URL |
| model | str | Qwen/Qwen3.5-32B-AWQ | LLM_MODEL |
| api_key | str\|None | None | LLM_API_KEY |
| timeout_s | int | 60 | LLM_TIMEOUT_S |
| max_retries | int | 2 | LLM_MAX_RETRIES |
| temperature | float | 0.0 | LLM_TEMPERATURE |
| max_tokens | int | 1024 | LLM_MAX_TOKENS |
### SnapshotConfig
| Param | Type | Default | Env var suffix |
|-------|------|---------|---------------|
| max_snapshot_length | int | 5000 | SNAPSHOT_MAX_LENGTH |
| max_content_length | int | 3000 | SNAPSHOT_MAX_CONTENT_LENGTH |
| include_links | bool | True | SNAPSHOT_INCLUDE_LINKS |
| filter_interactive_only | bool | False | SNAPSHOT_INTERACTIVE_ONLY |
### AgentConfig
| Param | Type | Default | Env var suffix |
|-------|------|---------|---------------|
| max_steps | int | 10 | AGENT_MAX_STEPS |
| history_max_entries | int | 5 | AGENT_HISTORY_MAX |
| cache_dir | str | ~/.cache/browsegrab | AGENT_CACHE_DIR |
| enable_cache | bool | True | AGENT_ENABLE_CACHE |
| loop_detection_window | int | 3 | AGENT_LOOP_WINDOW |
## BrowseSession
Main orchestrator. Async context manager. `BrowseSession(config?, manager?)`
### Methods
`navigate(url, **expectation) -> ActionResult` — Go to URL.
`snapshot() -> SnapshotResult` — AX tree snapshot, rebuilds RefMap.
`click(ref, **expectation) -> ActionResult` — Click element by ref ID.
`type(ref, text, clear=True, submit=False, **expectation) -> ActionResult` — Type into element.
`scroll(direction="down", amount=500, ref=None, **expectation) -> ActionResult` — Scroll page/element. direction: up|down|left|right.
`go_back(**expectation) -> ActionResult` — Browser back.
`wait(ms=1000, selector=None, state="visible") -> ActionResult` — Wait for time or element. state: visible|hidden|attached|detached.
`extract_content(max_length=None, scope=None) -> str` — Compressed DOM (AX tree + MarkGrab markdown).
`browse(url, objective, max_steps=None) -> BrowseResult` — Agentic multi-step browse with LLM planning.
`close() -> None` — Close session and browser.
## Result Types
### SnapshotResult
| Field | Type | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| tree_text | str | AX tree with [ref=eN] annotations |
| elements | list[RefElement] | Interactive elements |
| ref_count | int | Element count |
| url, title | str | Page URL and title |
| token_estimate | int | ~len/4 |
Method: `get_element(ref) -> RefElement|None`
### RefElement
Fields: `ref` (e.g. "e1"), `role` (link|button|textbox|...), `name`, `tag`, `value`, `level`, `focused`, `checked`, `expanded`, `selector`.
### ActionResult
| Field | Type | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| success | bool | Action succeeded |
| action | str | click\|navigate\|type\|scroll\|go_back\|wait\|extract |
| target | str | Ref ID or URL |
| url, title | str | Page state after action |
| snapshot | str\|None | AX tree if requested |
| content | str\|None | Markdown if requested |
| error | str\|None | Error message |
| token_estimate | int | Tokens consumed |
Method: `to_dict() -> dict`
### StepRecord
Fields: `step` (int, 0-based), `action` (str), `target` (str), `url` (str), `summary` (str), `success` (bool).
### BrowseResult
| Field | Type | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| success | bool | Objective achieved |
| url, title | str | Final page state |
| content | str | Extracted markdown |
| snapshot | str | Final AX tree |
| steps | list[StepRecord] | Action history |
| total_steps | int | Steps taken |
| total_tokens | int | Tokens consumed |
| processing_time_ms | float | Wall-clock ms |
| error | str\|None | Error if failed |
| metadata | dict | Extensible |
Method: `to_dict() -> dict`
## Browser Management
`BrowserManager(config?)` — Manages Playwright lifecycle, async context manager.
Methods: `new_context(**overrides) -> BrowserContext`, `new_page(**overrides) -> Page`, `close()`, `is_running: bool`.
Module functions: `get_manager(config?) -> BrowserManager` (singleton), `close_manager()`.
## DOM & Ref System
`compress_dom(page, ref_map, config?, include_content=False, scope_selector=None) -> str` — Dual-path: Path A = AX tree, Path B = MarkGrab markdown.
`RefMap` — Bidirectional ref-ID-to-element mapping. Methods: `clear()`, `assign(role, name, **attrs) -> RefElement`, `get(ref) -> RefElement|None`, `all_elements() -> list`, `count: int`, `is_interactive(role)`, `is_landmark(role)`.
Interactive roles: link, button, textbox, checkbox, radio, combobox, listbox, option, menuitem, tab, switch, slider, spinbutton, searchbox, menuitemcheckbox, menuitemradio, treeitem.
Landmark roles: heading, navigation, main, banner, contentinfo, complementary, form, region, dialog, alertdialog, alert.
`resolve_ref(page, ref, ref_map) -> Locator|None` — 4-strategy fallback: role selector -> CSS -> text -> None.
`take_snapshot(page, ref_map, config?) -> SnapshotResult` — AX tree via Playwright aria_snapshot(), adds [ref=eN] annotations.
## LLM Providers
Abstract `LLMProvider`: `chat(messages, temperature=0.0, max_tokens=1024) -> str`, `is_available() -> bool`, `name: str`, `model: str`, `plan_action(system_prompt, context, history, objective) -> dict`.
`VLLMProvider(base_url, model, api_key?, timeout_s=60)` — vLLM OpenAI-compat. Sends `enable_thinking: false`.
`OllamaProvider(base_url="http://localhost:11434", model="qwen2.5:14b", timeout_s=60)` — Ollama /api/chat.
`OpenAICompatProvider(base_url, model, api_key?, timeout_s=60)` — Generic OpenAI-compat.
`get_provider(config?) -> LLMProvider` — Factory from LLMConfig.
## JSON Parser
`parse_action_json(text) -> dict` — 5-stage fallback: direct parse -> code block -> brace boundary -> key-value cleanup -> regex. Raises ValueError if all fail.
Valid actions: click, type, scroll, navigate, go_back, wait, extract, done, fail.
## Prompt System
`build_action_prompt(objective, snapshot, history="", cached_hint="") -> list[dict]` — Builds system+user messages for LLM action planning (~400 token system prompt).
## Agent Intelligence
`PatternCache(cache_dir="~/.cache/browsegrab")` — Domain-based success pattern file cache (patterns.json, max 20/domain).
Methods: `lookup(url, objective) -> list[dict]|None`, `store(url, objective, actions)`, `get_hint(url, objective) -> str`, `clear(domain?)`.
`compress_history(steps, max_entries=5) -> str` — Compact history: first + summarized middle + last N (~100-300 tokens).
`LoopGuard(window_size=3, max_repeats=2)` — Sliding-window loop detection. Methods: `record(action, target="")`, `is_looping() -> bool`, `get_escape_hint() -> str`, `reset()`.
## MCP Server
Entry: `browsegrab-mcp` (stdio). 8 tools, all return JSON strings.
`browser_navigate(url, wait_until="domcontentloaded")` — Navigate, return snapshot.
`browser_click(ref)` — Click by ref ID.
`browser_type(ref, text, clear=True, submit=False)` — Type into input.
`browser_snapshot(interactive_only=False, max_length=5000)` — Get AX tree.
`browser_scroll(direction="down", amount=500, ref=None)` — Scroll page/element.
`browser_extract_content(scope=None, max_length=3000)` — Extract markdown.
`browser_go_back()` — Browser back.
`browser_wait(ms=1000, selector=None, state="visible")` — Wait for time/element.
## CLI
Entry: `browsegrab` (requires [cli] extra).
`browsegrab snapshot <url> [-f tree|text|json] [-i]` — AX tree snapshot.
`browsegrab extract <url> [-s SELECTOR] [-j]` — Extract compressed DOM.
`browsegrab browse <url> <objective> [-n STEPS] [-j]` — Agentic browse.
## LLM Action Schema
```
{"action":"click","ref":"eN"}
{"action":"type","ref":"eN","text":"...","submit":true|false}
{"action":"scroll","direction":"down|up|left|right","amount":500}
{"action":"navigate","url":"..."}
{"action":"go_back"}
{"action":"wait","ms":1000}
{"action":"extract"}
{"action":"done","result":"..."}
{"action":"fail","reason":"..."}
```
## Examples
### Snapshot + Manual Browsing
```python
from browsegrab import BrowseGrabConfig, BrowseSession
async with BrowseSession(BrowseGrabConfig()) as s:
    await s.navigate("https://news.ycombinator.com")
    snap = await s.snapshot()
    print(f"{snap.ref_count} elements, ~{snap.token_estimate} tokens")
    await s.type("e3", "browsegrab", submit=True)
    await s.wait(ms=2000)
    await s.click("e5")
    content = await s.extract_content()
```
### Agentic Browse
```python
from browsegrab import BrowseGrabConfig, BrowseSession
from browsegrab.config import LLMConfig, AgentConfig
config = BrowseGrabConfig(
    llm=LLMConfig(provider="ollama", model="qwen2.5:14b"),
    agent=AgentConfig(max_steps=15),
)
async with BrowseSession(config) as s:
    r = await s.browse("https://docs.python.org", "find asyncio.run docs")
    print(f"{'OK' if r.success else 'FAIL'} in {r.total_steps} steps, {r.total_tokens} tokens")
```
### MCP Config
```json
{"mcpServers":{"browsegrab":{"command":"browsegrab-mcp","env":{"BROWSEGRAB_LLM_PROVIDER":"ollama","BROWSEGRAB_LLM_MODEL":"qwen2.5:14b"}}}}
```
